justification: The question concerns the specific stock price movement of Truist Financial Corporation (TFC) traded on a public exchange.
question:
Will TFC's market close price on 2026-03-22 be higher than its market close price on 2026-03-15?

Stock splits and reverse splits will be accounted for in resolving this question. Forecasts on questions about companies that have been delisted (through mergers or bankruptcy) will resolve to their final close price.
